PLAT_Notes: Developer portal exists with login functionality and OAuth registration process

social.GIT_prog_lang_list: C++; Go; HTML/CSS; Java; JavaScript; Kotlin; PHP; Python; Ruby; TypeScript

evidence.API_evidence: GrabExpress API with GET, POST, DELETE endpoints documented. OAuth 2.0 authentication required. Multiple APIs including delivery quotes, create delivery, get delivery details, cancel delivery.
evidence.SDK_evidence: JavaScript SDK mentioned in GitHub repositories (superapp-sdk). Code examples in JavaScript and TypeScript in documentation.
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI models, agents, or AI-specific tools found in developer portal content.
evidence.language_evidence: All content in English. No language switcher or multi-language support detected.

coding_notes: Platform requires OAuth registration for API access. Comprehensive REST API documentation with multiple HTTP methods. GitHub presence with multiple programming languages. Privacy Notice serves as data governance policy. Contact Us page provides support channel.

changes.GIT_prog_lang_list: "C++; Go; HTML; Java; JavaScript; Kotlin; PHP; Python; Ruby; TypeScript" → "C++; Go; HTML/CSS; Java; JavaScript; Kotlin; PHP; Python; Ruby; TypeScript"
